concerns.text: Success Criteria SC-002 and SC-003 are contradictory. SC-002 states that achieving r ≥ 0.4 alone is sufficient for success (no p‑value requirement), whereas SC-003 adds an extra requirement that when r ≥ 0.4 the permutation‑test p‑value must be ≤ 0.05 after Bonferroni correction. This creates ambiguity: a result with r ≥ 0.4 but p > 0.05 would satisfy SC-002 but violate SC-003.
